summary: This document is an Excel spreadsheet detailing logic scenarios for fine-tuning the 'Talker' AI agent. It defines conversation archetypes, such as prioritizing direct questions versus primary goals, complete with example inputs, outputs, and explanations for training validation. The data represents internal engineering specifications for prompt behavior and model logic.
